title: Cursor pagination: pinning the cursor variable
prompt: Given that the user passes a cursor datetime `since_ts`, write `MyApp.Blog.next_page/2` that returns the next 20 published posts with `published_at < ^since_ts`, ordered by `(published_at desc, id desc)`. Pin the cursor. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Introduces cursor-based filtering with one pinned cursor. Single step.
